trans-unit.source: Diocese of Madhya Kerala | CMS Press Compound, Kottayam-1

With the blessing of Bishop Rt. Rev. Dr. Malayil Sabu Koshy Cherian, the CSI Counselling Centre offers holistic healing through compassionate, confidential, and evidence-based counselling. Our services are guided by a commitment to mental, emotional, and spiritual well-being.
Personal & online sessions for stress, anxiety, grief, and related challenges.
Resolve conflicts and strengthen family relationships with professional guidance.
Support for behavioral, academic, emotional development, and career guidance.
Assessments for learning difficulties, psychological testing, and career planning.
Three-day residential program to prepare couples for a strong and faithful marriage.
A certified half/one day programme to guide and educate youth preparing for confirmation.
S.H.A.P.E. - Student's Holistic and Pragmatic Empowerment
Empowering individuals to ensure holistic wellbeing through counselling and other initiatives.
Confidential counselling with sensitivity to Christian values.
Panel of certified psychologists, pastoral counsellors, and clergy.
Integration of professional therapy with spiritual care and support.
Both in-person and online appointments at affordable rates.
SHAPE programs, leadership workshops, and mental health campaigns.
A non-judgmental and peaceful setting for personal growth and healing.
Search by church name or participant name
Enter your registered email to access Feedback and Questionnaire Forms
You must register to access these forms.

Please select a form to proceed.
Share your thoughts and opinions to help us understand participants better.
What did you find most valuable about this session?
What is your definition of marriage?
What wishes and concerns do you have about marriage?
How did your parent’s physical and mental health relate to you in growing up?
Suppose the woman were the eldest of sisters/brothers and the man was the youngest child in his family and had elder sisters. How will that affect the marriage?
What are you expecting from your would-be partner?
Your understanding about sex? Who talked with you?
What fears/anxieties do you have about marriage?
How much time can you spend with your life partner after the marriage?
Advantages and disadvantages of the age differences?
How would your relationship with your parents and in-laws be during the early years of your marriage?
What will be the greatest adjustment when you are in a new home? What is your approach about family prayer and Sunday church service after your marriage?
Your responses have been submitted successfully!

A 3-day program to prepare couples for a committed and faithful marriage.
Counselling support for individuals, families, and students.
One-day counselling program for youth preparing for confirmation.

With a panel of certified counsellors, psychologists, and clergy dedicated to your holistic healing.
